german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant share of positions remains unclassified, highlighting accessibility challenges in the job market.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Despite Fragmented Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting an imbalance in the market.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: More than half of positions are held by senior professionals, indicating a strong senior-heavy market.

work_mode.title: Flexibility in Work Modes Remains Uncertain
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees experience mixed work arrangements, with remote and hybrid options leading.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with remote options remaining limited.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Nearly half of roles demand AI as a core responsibility or require related skills.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
